tests.source_program:
declare i8 @llvm.ucmp.i8.i32(i32, i32)

define i8 @ucmp_multiple_uses_ne_pattern(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
  %cmp = call i8 @llvm.ucmp.i8.i32(i32 %a, i32 %b)
  %other_use = add i8 %cmp, 0
  switch i8 %cmp, label %bb2 [
    i8 1, label %bb1
    i8 0, label %bb1
    i8 -1, label %bb2
  ]

bb1:
  ret i8 1

bb2:
  ret i8 2
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
declare i8 @llvm.ucmp.i8.i32(i32, i32)

define i8 @ucmp_multiple_uses_ne_pattern(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
  %cmp = call i8 @llvm.ucmp.i8.i32(i32 %a, i32 %b)
  %other_use = add i8 %cmp, 0
  %switch.cmp = icmp uge i32 %a, %b
  br i1 %switch.cmp, label %bb1, label %bb2

bb1:
  ret i8 1

bb2:
  ret i8 2
}
